text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I bring Winning Ticket to the infirmary to get her
injury looked at...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Aw, man... Looks like I went a teensy bit
overboard...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
But it's no problem! This is barely even a scratch!
And I had it treated properly!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I'll focus super hard on healing, so it'll be gone in no time! Let's get back to practice, Trainer!
choice_data_list:
Actually, let's take the rest of the day off to be
sure.
All right, let's go for it!
All right, let's go for it!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I'll focus super hard on healing, so it'll be gone in no time! Let's get back to practice, Trainer!
choice_data_list:
Actually, let's take the rest of the day off to be
sure.
All right, let's go for it!
All right, let's go for it!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
No, I swear, I'm totally fine! I get little injuries all
the time from working out!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Wow! Y-you're really that worried about me?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: That makes me s-so happyyy!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Trainer! Okay, I'll do as you say.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I'll get some rest and totally heal up! Then I can
go full power at training tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket relents and agrees to give herself
time to recover before training again.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Woo, that's what I'm talking about! You're the
best!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
All right! I'll dash at full speed back to the
training track right now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: CRICK!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Aaagh!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Y-yeah, of course! I'm totally... totally...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: ...not fine at aaaall! This kinda... really... HURTS!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We end up cutting practice short as I make sure
Winning Ticket gets all the rest she needs.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
All right! I'll dash at full speed back to the
training track right now!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Gotcha! Thanks for worrying about me! If it hurts
again, I'll tell you right away!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: But my full power won't lose to any injury!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I'll show you during training! Just watch me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taking Winning Ticket's injury in consideration,
we start training again after a short break.
